## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build PrInbox.slnx -c Release` passes (warnings are errors)
- [ ] `dotnet test PrInbox.slnx -c Release` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or internal-only hosts/identifiers introduced
